label: Project - Residential Client Main Contact Record ID# - Full Name

properties.formula: var text URL = URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() & "?a=er&dfid=10&rid=" & [Record ID#]; " Update "

If(
[Touchpoint Name]="Welcome Call",0,
[Touchpoint Name]="Design Approval",1,
[Touchpoint Name]="Permit Submitted",2,
[Touchpoint Name]="Permit Update",3,
[Touchpoint Name]="Permit Received",4,
[Touchpoint Name]="Install Scheduled",5,
[Touchpoint Name]="Install Update",6,
[Touchpoint Name]="Install Complete",7,
[Touchpoint Name]="Inspection Scheduled",8,
[Touchpoint Name]="Inspection Complete",9,
[Touchpoint Name]="PTO/NEM check in",10,
[Touchpoint Name]="PTO Approval",11
)

ToText(
    Size(GetFieldValues(
        GetRecords("{11.EX.'" & [Project - Residential Client Main Contact Record ID# - Full Name] & "'} AND {36.GT.'" & [Display Order] & "'} AND {20.XEX.''} ", "btvik5kwi"), 
    3)
))

URLRoot() & "db/" & [_DBID_PC_CUSTOMER_OUTREACH] & "?a=API_EditRecord" & "&rid=" & [Record ID#]
& "&_fid_66=1"
& "&_fid_37="&URLEncode("Macro Sent:"& [Official Outreach Text])
&"&rdr=" & URLEncode(URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() & "?a=er&rid=" & [Record ID#])

var text pcname = Case([Project Coordinator],"Gianna Neufeld","Gianna"
,"Paige Elkins","Paige","Noah"
,"Jeff Shaw","Jeff");



Case([Touchpoint Name],

"Welcome Call",
"Hello " &[Project - Residential Client Main Contact Record ID# - First Name] & "! My name is "&$pcname&", I will be your project manager! Please save my contact information in your phone. I will be your best point of contact for all your questions and updates throughout your solar journey. I want to make sure this process goes smoothly for you! Please reach out to me if there is anything I can do for you. Thank you for choosing us, have a great rest of your day!",
"Design Approval","Hi "&[Project - Residential Client Main Contact Record ID# - First Name]&", I hope this message finds you well.  Attached below is your finalized Solar design plan. Please take a moment to review and let me know if you have any questions! We are excited to share that we are scheduled to proceed with your project in 24 hours. Should you have any questions or require further clarification, do not hesitate to reach out!",
"Permit Submitted","",
"Permit Update","",
"Permit Received","",
"Install Update","",
"Install WIP","Our installation team has completed your solar panel installation! We are now finalizing your project, and our electrician will be in touch to schedule the return visit for electrical tie-in. If your solar lender contacts you, it is likely to confirm equipment arrival and installation. Feel free to reach out with any questions. I will keep you updated and look forward to speaking soon. Have a great day!",
"Install Complete","I just got confirmation that your system installation has been completed, congratulations! We will now get your system scheduled for inspection. I will let you know once this has been scheduled with your jurisdiction. Please let me know if you have any questions in the meantime!",
"Inspection Scheduled","Hey "&[Project - Residential Client Main Contact Record ID# - First Name]&", I hope all is well! I am reaching out to notify you that your inspection has been scheduled. Once your inspection has passed we will begin working on the final step to power on your system! ",
"Inspection Complete","Your project has passed inspection!  We are now working with your utility company to get your system powered on. Please keep an eye out for an email requesting your signature to proceed. Let me know if you have any questions at this time!",
"PTO/NEM check in","",
"PTO Approval","Great News! PTO (permission to operate) was approved by your utility company! YAY! Our Customer Experience team will be sending you an email shortly with the instructions to log into the mobile app and monitor your solar from your phone. It has been a pleasure working with you on your solar project, if you have any questions regarding activation, or monitoring your system don’t hesitate to reach our Customer Experience Team at (855)264-0363 or email us at support@kinhome.com",
"Inspection","",
"Cancel Request","",
"Cancel Reactivation","")
If([Outreach Text Override]="",[Outreach Text],[Outreach Text Override])
If(not(IsNull([Project - PTO Approved Date])),"Post PTO","Pre PTO")
